AMETEK INC/ — Disaggregation of Revenue (ASC 606), fiscal year ended 2022-12-31.
The Company disaggregates revenue by the timing of revenue recognition.
Revenue Recognized at a Point in Time: $5.15B.
Revenue Recognized Over Time: $998.9M.
Total net revenue is the sum of revenue recognized at a point in time and revenue recognized over time.
